scripts.build: npm run build -w @hyperload/gtfs-v4-struct && npm run build -w @hyperload/gtfs-v4-sql-load && npm run build -w @hyperload/gtfs-v4-frontend-sample
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @hyperload/gtfs-v4-struct && npm run typecheck -w @hyperload/gtfs-v4-sql-load && npm run typecheck -w @hyperload/gtfs-v4-frontend-sample
